faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Lyndhurst, NJ?
faqs.answer: Lyndhurst residents commonly encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in older Lyndhurst homes. Our technicians identify the specific species and apply targeted treatments for maximum effectiveness.
